If there are any row limiting operation used before 'Distinct' and after ordering then ordering will be used for it. Ordering(s) will be erased after 'Distinct' and results afterwards would be unordered.

BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE [__EFMigrationsHistory] (

(@p13, @p14, @p15, @p16, @p17, @p18, @p19, @p20, @p21, @p22, @p23, @p24, @p25, 1)) AS i ([CreatedAtUtc], [DedupKey], [IsRead], [Message], [NavigationUrl], [ReadAtUtc], [ReceiverRole], [ReceiverUserId], [ReminderMinutesBefore], [SourceId], [SourceType], [Title], [Type], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([CreatedAtUtc], [DedupKey], [IsRead], [Message], [NavigationUrl], [ReadAtUtc], [ReceiverRole], [ReceiverUserId], [ReminderMinutesBefore], [SourceId], [SourceType], [Title], [Type])
VALUES (i.[CreatedAtUtc], i.[DedupKey], i.[IsRead], i.[Message], i.[NavigationUrl], i.[ReadAtUtc], i.[ReceiverRole], i.[ReceiverUserId], i.[ReminderMinutesBefore], i.[SourceId], i.[SourceType], i.[Title], i.[Type])
OUTPUT INSERTED.[NotificationID], i._Position;
